topics.label: DbContext & DbSet
topics.description: Configure database connection, register entities, and OnModelCreating.

topics.label: LINQ Queries
topics.description: Where, Select, Include, ThenInclude, OrderBy. Type-safe database queries.

topics.label: Performance
topics.description: AsNoTracking, split queries, compiled queries, and batch operations.
